잠언 3:1.content: My son, don’t forget my teaching; but let your heart keep my commandments:

잠언 3:2.content: for they will add to you length of days, years of life, and peace.

잠언 3:3.content: Don’t let kindness and truth forsake you. Bind them around your neck. Write them on the tablet of your heart.

잠언 3:4.content: So you will find favor, and good understanding in the sight of God and man.

잠언 3:5.content: Trust in Yahweh with all your heart, and don’t lean on your own understanding.

잠언 3:6.content: In all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make your paths straight.

잠언 3:7.content: Don’t be wise in your own eyes. Fear Yahweh, and depart from evil.

잠언 3:8.content: It will be health to your body, and nourishment to your bones.

잠언 3:9.content: Honor Yahweh with your substance, with the first fruits of all your increase:

잠언 3:10.content: so your barns will be filled with plenty, and your vats will overflow with new wine.

잠언 3:11.content: My son, don’t despise Yahweh’s discipline, neither be weary of his correction;

잠언 3:12.content: for whom Yahweh loves, he corrects, even as a father reproves the son in whom he delights.

잠언 3:13.content: Happy is the man who finds wisdom, the man who gets understanding.

잠언 3:14.content: For her good profit is better than getting silver, and her return is better than fine gold.

잠언 3:15.content: She is more precious than rubies. None of the things you can desire are to be compared to her.

잠언 3:16.content: Length of days is in her right hand. In her left hand are riches and honor.

잠언 3:17.content: Her ways are ways of pleasantness. All her paths are peace.

잠언 3:18.content: She is a tree of life to those who lay hold of her. Happy is everyone who retains her.

잠언 3:19.content: By wisdom Yahweh founded the earth. By understanding, he established the heavens.

잠언 3:20.content: By his knowledge, the depths were broken up, and the skies drop down the dew.

잠언 3:21.content: My son, let them not depart from your eyes. Keep sound wisdom and discretion:

잠언 3:22.content: so they will be life to your soul, and grace for your neck.

잠언 3:23.content: Then you shall walk in your way securely. Your foot won’t stumble.

잠언 3:24.content: When you lie down, you will not be afraid. Yes, you will lie down, and your sleep will be sweet.

잠언 3:25.content: Don’t be afraid of sudden fear, neither of the desolation of the wicked, when it comes;

잠언 3:26.content: for Yahweh will be your confidence, and will keep your foot from being taken.

잠언 3:27.content: Don’t withhold good from those to whom it is due, when it is in the power of your hand to do it.

잠언 3:28.content: Don’t say to your neighbor, “Go, and come again; tomorrow I will give it to you,” when you have it by you.

잠언 3:29.content: Don’t devise evil against your neighbor, since he dwells securely by you.

잠언 3:30.content: Don’t strive with a man without cause, if he has done you no harm.

잠언 3:31.content: Don’t envy the man of violence. Choose none of his ways.

잠언 3:32.content: For the perverse is an abomination to Yahweh, but his friendship is with the upright.

잠언 3:33.content: Yahweh’s curse is in the house of the wicked, but he blesses the habitation of the righteous.

잠언 3:34.content: Surely he mocks the mockers, but he gives grace to the humble.

잠언 3:35.content: The wise will inherit glory, but shame will be the promotion of fools.
